content.en:
These strange silver sand were sprinkled at the bottom of this river and no one mined them, Ye Tian picked up these different silver sand one by one, and then left here.

He's going to take these different silver sand out, and then come back to find more different silver sand.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to take these different silver sand out.

"Although tens of thousands of different silver sand are not much, at least it is a good start, and then there will be more and more different silver sand on my body, and it should be very simple to compete for a place!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, time passed slowly, and Ye Tian found a lot of foreign silver sand at the bottom of the empty galaxy river.

Of course, Ye Tian's copy body has also encountered danger and fallen many times, after all, the creatures of the Voidless Galaxy will also fight each other.

However, Ye Tian could constantly replicate the creatures of the Voidless Galaxy, so he didn't worry about this problem at all.

As time passed, Ye Tian collected more and more Heterosilver Sand.

"I've collected tens of millions of different silver sand, which should be enough to exchange for a place!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Before he knew the specific effect of the Heterosilver Sand, there was no need for him to collect too much, if he understood it and it was useful to him, it would not be too late to collect the Heterosilver Sand again.

Moreover, it was not far from the arrival of Xuanqi Pavilion, and he had to make some preparations.

In the following days, Ye Tian traded various resources through various channels, and sent these resources to the Silent Black Sea.

In a short period of time, he acquired resources that are difficult to calculate.

These resources alone were enough to cultivate a large number of Supreme Ninefold Ancestors, enough to make the human race stronger and stronger.

And the price he himself paid was very small, and it was all exchanged for various rare resources that were fused.

this day.

Ye Tian went to a certain place in the Voidless Galaxy, which was also the place where the Xuanqi Pavilion team arrived.

When the time comes, the Great Ancestors will be able to pay enough Heterosilver Sand to get a place.

Of course, even if you can't get a place, Xuanqi Pavilion will make a bid to buy Yiyinsha.

However, there were very few Great Ancestors who would sell the Alien Silver Sand to Xuanqi Pavilion, because the price would not be too high, so it would be better to sell it to other Great Ancestors.

......

Near the empty galaxy, there is no empty giant city.

At this time, there are a number of great ancestors gathered here, and the great ancestors who were difficult to see in the past have now seen a lot here.

Even if there are not many Great Ancestors of Alien Silver Sand, they have come here at this moment, firstly to watch the excitement, and secondly, to sell a small amount of Alien Silver Sand on their bodies at a high price by the way.

And Ye Tian also came here.

"There are so many great ancestors!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

There are dozens of Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestors in the Silent Black Sea who are the same as the Great Ancestors, and the number of Great Ancestors here is so large, it has already exceeded 10,000!

And this is just a small place in the Xuanqi Territory, and there are more Great Ancestors in other places.

In the Voidless Giant City, Ye Tian saw the Golden Glass Great Ancestor and several other Great Ancestors, but more Great Ancestors still didn't come here.

The Golden Glass Great Ancestor thought that Ye Tian was just here to see, and they would never have imagined that Ye Tian's goal was one of the fifty places.

......

"It's almost there!"

A great ancestor flew out of the voidless giant city and came to the outside of the city, looking through the distant void and looking into the interior of the voidless galaxy.

At this time, a silver linkun was swimming in the voidless galaxy, and its powerful aura made those creatures dare not approach.

But many Great Ancestors noticed that this Yinlin Kun was cracked all over its body, and the injury was not light.

For this situation, the great ancestors present had already known about it, otherwise they would not have reduced the quota.

Soon.

The Yinlin Kun arrived here, and more than a dozen Great Ancestors came down from the Yinlin Kun.

Among them, there are two high-level immeasurable lifeforms and more than a dozen middle-level immeasurable lifeforms.

And these dozen or so middle-level immeasurable lifeforms are not ordinary middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, their strength is extremely powerful, they are definitely the top middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, maybe they are only a line away from high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"Xuanqi Pavilion actually sent two high-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

Many Great Ancestors were secretly surprised.

In the past, most of the time, only one high-level immeasurable lifeform was sent, but this time, two were sent.

At this time, one of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms said, "I am the Xuanwu Great Ancestor of Xuanqi Pavilion, and I originally agreed to take fifty Great Ancestors away this time. But when he came, Yinlin Kun was injured again, so in order to ensure safety, this time there were only forty Great Ancestors!"

"What? There are only forty places?"

The Great Ancestors were stunned.

In particular, some of the great ancestors who thought they had a great grasp are now panicking, and there are ten fewer places all of a sudden, which is very likely to make him completely lose hope!

The competition for places is carried out in a competitive manner, starting from the first place auction, whoever comes out of the different silver sand can get a place.

The Great Ancestors of the Xuanqi Pavilion didn't want to waste any more time in this hopeless place, and soon began to announce the bidding.

And the starting price is 100,000 different silver sand, which makes many ancestors who don't have much different silver sand choose to give up directly.

"Two hundred thousand different silver sand!"

"300,000 different silver sand!"

"500,000 different silver sand!"

There are very few places, so these great ancestors are competing wildly.

Of course.

The bidding price for the first place is definitely not low, and some ancestors feel that the bidding price in the back should be lower, after all, there are many ancestors of different silver sand who will be the first to buy places, so there should not be much different silver sand on the big ancestors who compete later.

However, as the number of places became smaller and smaller, these Great Ancestors would also temporarily trade more Heterosilver Sand with each other, and the auction would become even more intense.

So, it's hard to say.

Ye Tian had enough foreign silver sand, so he didn't care about the so-called auction price at all.

"1.3 million different silver sand!"

Ye Tian opened his mouth to bid.

This bidding price directly made the other Great Ancestors completely give up the bidding, after all, the last time the bidding for the place of Yiyinsha was not so high!

At this time.

The Golden Glass Ancestor stared at Ye Tian with some surprise, he never expected that Ye Tian would have so much foreign silver sand.

"It's strange, Xuanming Great Ancestor hasn't been a Great Ancestor for a long time, it stands to reason that he can't find so many Alien Silver Sands, could it be that he traded from other Great Ancestors during this time?

The Golden Glass Ancestor was a little puzzled.

Immediately, he was going to contact Ye Tian privately to see if Ye Tian could trade some foreign silver sand for him.

He felt that Ye Tian must still have the Alien Silver Sand on his body, and Ye Tian had already obtained a place, so the extra Alien Silver Sand should not be needed.
